mapper.sql: n.id AS notice_id, n.title AS title, n.content AS content, n.level AS level, n.popup_enabled AS popup_enabled, nu.read_status AS read_status, n.published_at AS published_at, nu.read_at AS read_at, n.valid_from AS valid_from, n.valid_to AS valid_to, n.remark AS remark
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jq_sys_notice_user (notice_id, user_id, read_status, read_at) VALUES
(#{item.noticeId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.readAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jq_sys_notice_user nu INNER JOIN jq_sys_notice n ON n.id = nu.notice_id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY nu.read_status ASC, n.published_at DESC, n.id DESC
SELECT FROM jq_sys_notice_user nu INNER JOIN jq_sys_notice n ON n.id = nu.notice_id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND nu.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM jq_sys_notice_user nu INNER JOIN jq_sys_notice n ON n.id = nu.notice_id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND nu.read_status = 0 AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.is_deleted = 0

SELECT FROM jq_sys_notice_user nu INNER JOIN jq_sys_notice n ON n.id = nu.notice_id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY n.published_at DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM jq_sys_notice_user nu INNER JOIN jq_sys_notice n ON n.id = nu.notice_id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND nu.read_status = 0 AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.popup_enabled = 1 AND (n.valid_from IS NULL OR n.valid_from <= #{now}) AND (n.valid_to IS NULL OR n.valid_to >= #{now}) ORDER BY CASE n.level WHEN 'URGENT' THEN 3 WHEN 'IMPORTANT' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, n.published_at DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT user_id FROM jq_sys_notice_user WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} ORDER BY user_id ASC
